prompt: After a queue eviction is fixed by an engine-triggered revision and head-branch CI is green again, may the engine auto-resubmit the PR to the Trunk queue without a fresh merge click (budget-capped by the existing ci_attempt_budget)? Answering no makes each resubmission an attention item + a manual merge re-click.
When should the flunge queue-only enforcement flip happen relative to the engine work?
choices: Immediately after task 10's pre-enforcement validation (one merge + one eviction cycle)
After a bake period of several organic queue-backed merges with enforcement off
Only on my explicit go-ahead, no predefined trigger
